prerequisites: A personal API token for that account, obtained from the Todoist integrations settings page (https://app.todoist.com/app/settings/integrations). This single token value populates the connector's required `token` field.

authMethods.name: Personal API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single secret `token`. Todoist passes this token in an `Authorization: Bearer $token` header on every REST API request. Obtain the personal API token from your Todoist account's integrations settings and paste it into the `token` field.

setupSteps.title: Get your personal API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Todoist and open the integrations settings at https://app.todoist.com/app/settings/integrations. Copy your personal API token shown there. This long-lived token grants access to your account's projects, tasks, and related data through the REST API.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token into the connector's required `token` field (the only configuration field). The connector sends it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` against the Todoist API, so no other host or credential configuration is needed.

setupSteps.title: Verify access
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token is valid by letting the connector make a read request to the Todoist REST API. A successful response returns your account's data; a 401/403 indicates the token is missing, mistyped, or revoked, in which case regenerate or re-copy it from the integrations settings page.
